title: Villages & Vindicators II
description:
Roleplaying based modpack that aims for a vanilla-ish gameplay loop with many overhauled systems.

Multiplayer Friendly.
body:
![Title of the modpack 'Villages & Vindicators II'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cca8b40f988e2102e071b5e181eada04f7031ae.png)

🎲 Express yourself like never before. In a fantastical overhauled Minecraft. 🎲

This modpack aims to provide a vanilla-like multi-player friendly experience, while not being vanilla+. The gameplay loop you know and love is still about the same, but many of the systems have been overhauled. With many added features to express yourself and engage with friends. You will also have to watch your temperature as your world changes through the seasons

|![A tall set of looming towers covered in vines. Inviting for treasure hunters.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4120cc3177f3088bbf8c9f9b4c0abf2e38194eca_0.webp)| ![A 'Super Harvest Moon' rises from behind the tree line as night settles in. The player hot bar shows customized tool and the new health system.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b40f320e185281ca6555a23b6d6bc4cb18e32836.png)| |---------------------|:---------------------:| ##

Features:

### Farming 🍞 At the start of your adventure, you will only have 3 hearts! Eating food with raise these hearts for a time. They also will increase your health regen! You can eat up to three different meals for max benefits. Wild crops like carrots and tomatoes will be useful in the early game. With _Farmer's Delight_, you can grow and prepare even better meals over time that offer you better health and better regen. ### Better Combat ⚔️ An obvious choice for any pack. _Better Combat_ changes combat to be similar to that found in Minecraft Dungeons. Weapons now swing and sweep depending on the type, rather than be a bullet hit-scan. With supporting mods like _Truly Modular_ and _Combat Roll_, combat will be much more engaging and dynamic. While still being easy to understand. The pack also includes _Iron's Spells & Spellbook's_ for those who are more magically inclined. ### Dungeons N'Landscapes 🌍 There are many more structures in this mod. As well as a diverse ecosystem. Climb mountains & volcanos to raid trecherous dungeons. Or fortify and defend one of the many diverse villages you find. Villages come in many more shapes and sizes. New and old. Some will be grand. Some will be quaint. Along with this all Villagers will spawn with a name to them. Will you be their protector? Or their plunderer? ### Transportation 🚂 It's a big world out there, and you'll need ways to get around. Luckily with _Create_ mod you can create Trains that transport among all your desired locations. Prefer something less grand? With _Immersive Aircraft_ you can build yourself several different types of aircraft to get around in style. |![A cliff side house in the middle of Summer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cee28ba1014685bcbfcdc40af500427fb232eb1_0.webp)| ![A cliff side house in the middle of Autumn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afab954f419f127f411eb306409c8a2e75a8272b_0.webp)|![A cliff side house in the middle of Winter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d43183fa081daf877eb40061929c9060e0090792_0.webp)|![A cliff side house in the middle of Spring](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89343ce18092ca2db3a790d8d9429179922f9cfd_0.webp)| |---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|---------------------:| Other Notable Features: - 👫 Player Instanced Loot - 🎨 Painting - 🎶 Music Creation - 🐒 Diverse Mobs - 🔨 Customizable Tools & Armor - 🌳 Seasons - 🏠 Furniture & Decorations - 🤖 Balanced Automation - 👾 Boss & Miniboss Music - And more! ### **Important Notice:** Do NOT update all mods in the mod pack! Certain mod updates can break the pack! It's important to update a few at a time and see what works.
